prerequisites: An Apptivo account on a Premium or Ultimate plan, since Apptivo provides API keys only to businesses on those plans.
Both required credentials from your Apptivo account: api_key and access_key.
Sign-in access to Apptivo with privileges to open Business Settings and view the API Access page.

authMethods.name: API Key and Access Key
authMethods.summary: Apptivo authenticates each request with two credentials, apiKey and accessKey, which map to the connector's api_key and access_key secret fields. Both are required and are generated together on the Apptivo API Access page. They are sent as parameters on every API request via GET or POST over SSL.

setupSteps.title: Open the API Access page in Apptivo
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Apptivo, go to Business Settings, and select API Access in the left navigation panel.

setupSteps.title: Obtain your API Key and Access Key
setupSteps.body: On the API Access page, copy the API Key and Access Key shown on the right side. Use the Regenerate button only if you need to issue new keys, which invalidates the previous ones.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector credentials
setupSteps.body: Enter the values into the connector's required secret fields: set api_key to your Apptivo API Key and access_key to your Apptivo Access Key. Both fields are required.
